op.title: Did Andy Madison deserve it?
op.body: He's still my favorite blackballed actor. It's not like he pledged allegiance to Chairman Cheng or anything. Just seems unfair how Hollywood did him.

replies.body: anybody with a platform is gonna be under different standards, man. I don't disagree with some of the things he said, but the way he said it sounded damn close to illegal speech

Communism is illegal in the United States. Celebrities do not get a pass. He's lucky that this isn't being taken to court, because the verdict would likely be capital punishment due to being an anti-American propagandist and spy/saboteur.
He shouldn't have pivoted to comedy
Sorry for rezzbump but is Elephant Hill still worth going to now that they've cut ties with Andy? My boyfriend and I are going to be in the area
what the fuck is a chinese
